subject: changes needed for currency trade confirmation

emails.subject: changes needed for currency trade confirmation
emails.subject_base: changes needed for currency trade confirmation
emails.body: Sara, Are we able to do FX deals with the company shown below? Also, would this be an RMT confirm or an ENA confirm? Forwarded by Laurel Adams/HOU/ECT on 04/17/2001 05:20 PM From: Ana Rizvi on 04/17/2001 04:59 PM

emails.subject: changes needed for currency trade confirmation
emails.subject_base: changes needed for currency trade confirmation
emails.body: Sara, Have you had a chance to look into this? Per Stuart, this company is owned by Enron. We bought it outright, with the intent of putting into an off-balance sheet company. I'm not sure if that part has happened yet, but we theorize that when we entered into the hedge, it was still fully Enron owned. Bob Crane would really like to get this resolved, so if you could let me know your thoughts, I'd appreciate it. Do I need to check with Rhett Jackson in tax as well? Forwarded by Laurel Adams/HOU/ECT on 04/24/2001 02:31 PM Laurel Adams 04/17/2001 05:22 PM

emails.subject: Re: changes needed for currency trade confirmation
emails.subject_base: changes needed for currency trade confirmation
emails.body: Re: changes needed for currency trade confirmation Laurel: I have left messages with Rhett Jackson (RMT vs. ENA) and Brad Kirchhofer (why doesn't "Compagnie de Papiers Stadacona" show up on the corporate database). Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Laurel Adams 04/24/2001 02:43 PM
